# Agentic Learning Command Centre (ALCC)

The engine of governed self-improvement. ALCC turns the runtime's
Experience into candidate improvements -- proposals the runtime might make
to itself -- and hands each to the legitimacy gate and the evolution fences.
Proposing is not applying: a learned candidate is a suggestion until every
gate passes it. The system may improve itself; it may not do so outside the
gate everything else passes through.

## Triggers

- Any distilled adaptation ready to be proposed as a change.
- Any candidate self-modification awaiting legitimacy and approval.

## State

- `candidates.json` -- proposed changes and their standing in the gate.
- `audit_trail.jsonl` -- the append-only ledger of learning proposals.
